steps.title: Spot the consistent personification
steps.content: The passage repeatedly describes Night using human characteristics: it wears a garment, has her face, involves she draws a veil, contains her hair, and features the subtle hands of Night. This pattern of treating an abstract concept as a person runs throughout.

steps.title: Match the sustained metaphor
steps.content: Night is portrayed throughout with human characteristics—clothing, facial features, hair, and hands—creating a sustained metaphorical treatment of night as if it were a person. The other choices invoke rural/urban divisions, sunrise imagery, or seasonal shifts that are absent from the passage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
